shortSword.name: Power Wave
shortSword.description: Charge power to release shock waves.

shortSword.name: Dash Slash
shortSword.description: Closes the gap between enemies in an instant. Good timing may net you an additional leg drop.

shortSword.name: Rush Attack
shortSword.description: Press the button repeatedly for additional attacks and a finisher.

shortSword.name: Round Break
shortSword.description: A cyclone attack that blows away foes. Great to use when surrounded.

shortSword.name: Mind Thrust
shortSword.description: Find and attack your enemy's weak point. May inflict status ailments as well.

dualBlades.name: Blitz
dualBlades.description: Speed up attack rate by sharpening concentration.

dualBlades.name: Twin Attack
dualBlades.description: Stab, twist and pull -- like a psychotic mantra. Simple, but effective.

dualBlades.name: Storm
dualBlades.description: Execute continuous attacks in the air. Keep pressing the button for additional moves.

dualBlades.name: Gust
dualBlades.description: Jump up and soar in the air. Also useful for dodging attacks.

dualBlades.name: Rail Strike
dualBlades.description: A jump-spin attack. Dynamic and hard to counter.

longSword.name: Wind Slash
longSword.description: A vertical jump-spin attack. Keep pressing the button to increase the number of spins.

longSword.name: Flash Strike
longSword.description: Blow away foes with one swing. Covers wide areas very effectively.

longSword.name: Steel Heart
longSword.description: Become strong enough not to stagger when attacked, but take more damage.

longSword.name: Delta Strike
longSword.description: A fluid attack of lunging and cutting.

longSword.name: Naive Blade
longSword.description: Anticipate your enemy's attacks and quickly strike back.

spear.name: Hurricane
spear.description: A fancy attack with a toss, spin and juggle.

spear.name: Reaper Slash
spear.description: Long-ranged attack. Best used when surrounded.

spear.name: Millionstrike
spear.description: A swift stab. Creates shock waves to hit multiple times.

spear.name: Axel Disaster
spear.description: Spinning and boring. Must face the enemy head-on to inflict continuous damage.

axehammer.name: Stardust Upper
axehammer.description: Knock enemies into the air. They can also be attacked while spinning.

axehammer.name: Grand Impact
axehammer.description: Hit the ground and cause an earthquake. Press the button for multiple hits.

axehammer.name: Tornado Swing
axehammer.description: Spinning lunge attack. Keep pressing the button to increase the number of spins. Just don't make yourself dizzy!

axehammer.name: Giga Swing
axehammer.description: With its incredible strength, enemies are blown back until they hit something.

fist.name: Double Kick
fist.description: Spin and kick enemies so hard.

fist.name: Straight Punch
fist.description: Concentrates and give foes a strong blow.

fist.name: Neko Damashi
fist.description: A legendary technique using palm of the hand to cause distress and surprise all in one!

fist.name: Rush Punch
fist.description: Punch many times at high speed. Enemies are already dead.

fist.name: Cyclone
fist.description: Blow away enemies by spinning your body super fast.

fist.name: Rapid Move
fist.description: Move toward an enemy in an instant. Also useful to dodge attacks.

other.name: Escape
other.description: Used for instant transport. Where it takes you depends on where you use it, but the last stop is always home.

other.name: Greeting Spell
other.description: If you say hello, even people who don't like you will say hi back. They'll be your special friends. Your special awake friends.

cures.name: Cure
cures.description: Recovers HP, for yourself and for nearby companions. Doesn't recover much, but uses few RP.

cures.name: Cure All
cures.description: Recovers a lot of HP for you and your companions, even if they're not close by. Uses lots of RP.

cures.name: Master Cure
cures.description: Greatly recovers HP, but consumes a large amount of RP in the process.

cures.name: Medipoison
cures.description: A purifying light will cleanse the toxins in your body.

cures.name: Mediparalyze
cures.description: A purifying light will enable you to move once more.

cures.name: Mediseal
cures.description: A purifying light will bring back your inner power.

fire.name: Fireball
fire.description: Hurls small fireballs. Can hurl up to 3 at a time.

fire.name: Big Fire
fire.description: Hurls large fireballs. Can hurl up to 2 at a time.

fire.name: Explosion
fire.description: Hurls giant fireballs that cause explosions on impact, damaging their surroundings.

water.name: Water Laser
water.description: Emits a water beam that can penetrate stone. The longer you maintain it, the bigger the impact.

water.name: Parallel Laser
water.description: Emits 2 water beams that can penetrate stone. The longer you maintain them, the bigger the impact.

water.name: Delta Laser
water.description: Emits 3 water beams that can penetrate stone. Particularly effective when surrounded by foes.

earth.name: Screw Rock
earth.description: Summons sharp rocks that substitute for your fists. Designed for fighter mages.

earth.name: Earth Spike
earth.description: Summons stone pillars that track enemies and strike them from below.

earth.name: Avenger Rock
earth.description: Stab its target with a large rock. Also known as the "drill punch."

wind.name: Sonic Wind
wind.description: Emits spinning wind blades that automatically track and shred their foes to pieces.

wind.name: Double Sonic
wind.description: Emits 2 spinning wind blades. Their arched trajectory makes it hard to attack enemies in front.

wind.name: Penetrate Sonic
wind.description: Emits 3 spinning wind blades that move freely in multiple directions, shredding to bits all who get in their way.

light.name: Light Barrier
light.description: Emits 2 light balls in front of you, protecting from enemies.

light.name: Shine
light.description: Emits 4 light balls that spin around you, protecting you from enemies.

light.name: Prism
light.description: Emits spinning light balls. Provides complete protection from all enemies for a short while.

dark.name: Dark Ball
dark.description: Emits a dark light ball that travels slowly and destroys everything in its way.

dark.name: Dark Snake
dark.description: Emits a dark light ball that snakes forward slowly and destroys everything in its path.

dark.name: Darkness
dark.description: Forbidden spell that summons an entrance to the depths of darkness.

music.name: Iron Waltz
music.description: A musical score that powers up allied monsters' defense until the end of the day.

music.name: Striking March
music.description: A musical score that powers up allied monsters' strength until the end of the day.

music.name: Bonus Concerto
music.description: A musical score that inspires allied monsters to do their best in combat.*
